signals.headline: Market-Moving Significance:**
signals.raw:
Market-Moving Significance:**
The April 10 rate decision is the most recent market-relevant announcement. It signals the BOK's cautious stance amid inflationary pressures from global oil prices and currency weakness (won trading around 1,520 per USD)[3]. However, this was widely anticipated and not breaking news at that time.
